series_metadata.series_description: A) Educational Broadcasting Facilities Act (HEW): applications for grants by affiliated stations' - filed by call letters. B) General Information about EBFP: applications and grants, HEW files, priority schedules, etc. C) Federal Communications Commission (FCC) and Federal Aviation Administration (FAA): correspondence, policy, table of allocations, FCC comments, general and on specific subjects.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 20 years in files, then transferred to departmental storage area for 5 years, then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
